# Listbox

A static list selection component for choosing one or more items from a visible list. Unlike Select or Combobox, the options are always visible and do not appear in a dropdown.

## Import

```jsx
import { Listbox } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

All sub-components are accessible as properties of the main `Listbox` component using dot notation:

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Listbox` | The root wrapper (renders `Listbox.Root`). Manages selection state |
| `Listbox.Item` | An individual selectable item |
| `Listbox.ItemText` | The text content of an item |
| `Listbox.ItemIndicator` | Check indicator for selected items |
| `Listbox.ItemGroup` | A group of related items |
| `Listbox.ItemGroupLabel` | Label for an item group |
| `Listbox.Label` | Label for the listbox |
| `Listbox.Empty` | Content displayed when the list is empty |
| `Listbox.Content` | Content container that wraps the list items |
| `Listbox.Input` | A search/filter input for filtering list items |
| `Listbox.ValueText` | Displays the currently selected value as text |

## Listbox (Root) Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `collection` | `ListCollection` | - | The collection of items (from Chakra `createListCollection`) |
| `value` | `string[]` | - | Controlled selected value(s) |
| `defaultValue` | `string[]` | - | Initial selected value(s) for uncontrolled usage |
| `onValueChange` | `(details: { value: string[], items: any[] }) => void` | - | Callback fired when the selection changes |
| `selectionMode` | `"single" \| "multiple"` | `"single"` | Whether single or multiple items can be selected |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the listbox is disabled |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
import { createListCollection } from "@chakra-ui/react";

const items = createListCollection({
  items: [
    { label: "React", value: "react" },
    { label: "Vue", value: "vue" },
    { label: "Angular", value: "angular" },
    { label: "Svelte", value: "svelte" },
  ],
});

<Listbox collection={items}>
  <Listbox.Label>Select a framework</Listbox.Label>
  {items.items.map((item) => (
    <Listbox.Item key={item.value} item={item}>
      <Listbox.ItemText>{item.label}</Listbox.ItemText>
      <Listbox.ItemIndicator />
    </Listbox.Item>
  ))}
</Listbox>
```

### Multiple selection

```jsx
<Listbox collection={items} selectionMode="multiple" defaultValue={["react"]}>
  <Listbox.Label>Select technologies</Listbox.Label>
  {items.items.map((item) => (
    <Listbox.Item key={item.value} item={item}>
      <Listbox.ItemText>{item.label}</Listbox.ItemText>
      <Listbox.ItemIndicator />
    </Listbox.Item>
  ))}
</Listbox>
```

### With grouped items

```jsx
<Listbox collection={groupedItems}>
  <Listbox.Label>Choose a tool</Listbox.Label>
  <Listbox.ItemGroup>
    <Listbox.ItemGroupLabel>Frontend</Listbox.ItemGroupLabel>
    <Listbox.Item item={react}>
      <Listbox.ItemText>React</Listbox.ItemText>
      <Listbox.ItemIndicator />
    </Listbox.Item>
    <Listbox.Item item={vue}>
      <Listbox.ItemText>Vue</Listbox.ItemText>
      <Listbox.ItemIndicator />
    </Listbox.Item>
  </Listbox.ItemGroup>
  <Listbox.ItemGroup>
    <Listbox.ItemGroupLabel>Backend</Listbox.ItemGroupLabel>
    <Listbox.Item item={node}>
      <Listbox.ItemText>Node.js</Listbox.ItemText>
      <Listbox.ItemIndicator />
    </Listbox.Item>
  </Listbox.ItemGroup>
</Listbox>
```

### With search input and content container

```jsx
<Listbox collection={items}>
  <Listbox.Label>Select a framework</Listbox.Label>
  <Listbox.Input placeholder="Search..." />
  <Listbox.Content>
    {items.items.map((item) => (
      <Listbox.Item key={item.value} item={item}>
        <Listbox.ItemText>{item.label}</Listbox.ItemText>
        <Listbox.ItemIndicator />
      </Listbox.Item>
    ))}
    <Listbox.Empty>No items match your search</Listbox.Empty>
  </Listbox.Content>
  <Listbox.ValueText />
</Listbox>
```

### With empty state

```jsx
<Listbox collection={emptyCollection}>
  <Listbox.Label>Results</Listbox.Label>
  <Listbox.Empty>No items available</Listbox.Empty>
</Listbox>
```

### Controlled

```jsx
const [selected, setSelected] = useState(["react"]);

<Listbox
  collection={items}
  value={selected}
  onValueChange={(e) => setSelected(e.value)}
  selectionMode="multiple"
>
  <Listbox.Label>Frameworks</Listbox.Label>
  {items.items.map((item) => (
    <Listbox.Item key={item.value} item={item}>
      <Listbox.ItemText>{item.label}</Listbox.ItemText>
      <Listbox.ItemIndicator />
    </Listbox.Item>
  ))}
</Listbox>
```

## Features

- Always-visible list for direct item selection (no dropdown)
- Supports single and multiple selection modes
- Grouped items with labels for organized lists
- Empty state content when no items are available
- Keyboard accessible with arrow key navigation
- Compound component pattern for fully customizable layouts
- Each sub-component forwards refs to its underlying DOM element
